docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BELL, LARRY ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 12/12/19. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 12/12/19. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "UNABLE TO FORWARD/FOR REVIEW."

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BELL, LARRY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BOLTON, LONNIE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY BELL, LARRY AS TO DEFENDANT BOLTON, LONNIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-26-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-26-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-26-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF LARRY BELL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LONNIE BOLTON IS PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. DEFENDANT WAVIES SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-26-2019 - JUDGMENT.
